MLSysBook

Machine Learning Systems • Development Environment

📖

Textbook

Two-volume textbook covering foundations through production-scale distributed systems

🧪

Interactive Labs

33 browser-based Marimo labs — predict, discover, and explain ML systems concepts

Open Labs Preview →
🔥

TinyTorch

Build an ML framework from scratch — 20 progressive modules from tensors to transformers

Open TinyTorch Preview →
📦

Hardware Kits

Deploy ML on real edge devices — Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Seeed XIAO, and Grove Vision AI

Open Kits Preview →
⚙️

MLSys·IM

Physics-grounded simulator for modeling ML systems from microcontrollers to exaflop fleets

Lecture Slides

35 Beamer decks with speaker notes, active learning moments, and 266 SVG diagrams

Instructor Hub
